channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

Robert Downey Jr. stopped by #CinemaCon to give attendees a first look #AvengersDoomsday, where he’ll return to the MCU as Doctor Doom. His ‘Avengers’ costar Chris Evans also reunited with Downey Jr. to reveal his character Steve Rogers is back. Rea - Facebook
